title: Lock Doors From Villagers
description: A mod that lets you mark wooden doors as locked for villagers. By default, villagers are blocked by iron doors only. This mod allows you to selectively treat targeted wooden doors as "iron-like" for villager behavior.
body:
# Lock Doors From Villagers
A lightweight mod that lets players lock specific wooden doors so villagers treat them as inaccessible.

By default, villagers are blocked by iron doors only. This mod allows you to selectively treat targeted wooden doors as "iron-like" for villager behavior.

Use simple commands while looking at a door to lock, unlock, or check its status. This is useful for controlling villager movement in towns, trading halls, and custom builds without replacing doors with iron ones.

### Commands

```
/villagerdoor lock
/villagerdoor unlock
/villagerdoor status
```

### Why use it?
- Keep villagers out of selected rooms
- Control traffic in trading halls
- Preserve the look of wooden doors in builds
